# Daily Flow Summary

The worst day. Tybalt discovered the collaboration and confronted me this morning. He fired Mercutio from his Capulet consulting contract on the spot — completely unfair.

Emergency meeting with the Montague Tech team this afternoon. Benvolio was concerned but fair. I clarified that no company IP was used — everything was new, on personal time, in a private repo.

Reaching out to Professor Lawrence to mediate. Both companies trust him. This has to be resolved before it destroys everything.
